final:
// // This module implements a 1-bit D flip-flop with synchronous reset and disable.
module d_flip_flop
(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input en,
    input d,
    output reg q
);

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        q <= 1'b0;
    end
    else if (en) begin
        q <= d;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 1-bit D flip-flop with synchronous reset and disable.
